{{CargoOrgan
|name=Quantum Energy Cube
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10929
|idx=135
|description=A crystal so improbable that observing it alters researcher tenure tracks. Implant at your own risk - results range from ascension to becoming a walking Copenhagen interpretation.
|skill=
|hp=2760
|def=262
|atk=272
|rush=260
|gene1=All Sanctum Glorium Output +10%
|gene2=Earth DMG +120
|gene3=All Sanctum Glorium Output +10%
|gene4=Tribal Amber output +10%
|gene5=Fire DMG +120
|gene6=Tribal Amber output +10%
|gene7=Earth DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
